purpose: Owns reaction row persistence (idb-keyval), the in-memory module-singleton state map, subscriber registry for useSyncExternalStore, and the aggregation/query helpers. Produces Seam S2 (Reactions read API) and Seam S4 (inbound reaction ingest entry point).

public_api.name: loadReactions
public_api.description: Reads the idb-keyval namespace for the given thread in a single get() call (O(1) idb calls per thread). Populates the in-memory map. Returns all Reaction rows (including tombstoned rows) for the thread.

public_api.name: applyOptimistic
public_api.description: Appends the given optimistic Reaction row to the in-memory map and persists to idb-keyval. Notifies subscribers after the idb write resolves. The row must have eventId === '' (in-flight). Uses a per-thread serialized write queue.

public_api.name: rollbackOptimistic
public_api.description: Removes the row matching optimisticId from the in-memory map and idb-keyval, but only if the row's eventId is empty string. Rows with a confirmed eventId are not removed. Notifies subscribers after the idb write resolves.

public_api.name: applyInboundRumor
public_api.signature: applyInboundRumor(thread: ReactionThreadKey, rumor: { id: string; pubkey: string; created_at: number; content: string; tags: string[][] }): Promise<{ messageId: string } | null>
public_api.description: Processes an inbound kind-7 wire rumor. Extracts messageId from the e-tag. Returns null (silent discard) if no row for that messageId exists in the thread's store (spec §2.4). Returns null if rumor.id already exists in the store (eventId dedup). If content === '-', sets removed: true on the matching (messageId, reactorPubkey, emoji) row. Otherwise upserts a Reaction row keyed on (messageId, reactorPubkey, emoji). Notifies subscribers after idb write resolves. Uses a per-thread serialized write queue.

public_api.name: aggregateForMessage
public_api.signature: aggregateForMessage(rows: Reaction[], messageId: string, selfPubkey: string): ReactionAggregate[]
public_api.description: Pure synchronous function. Filters rows by messageId, excludes removed rows, groups by emoji, counts, sorts reactors oldest-first by createdAt. Sets selfReacted true iff selfPubkey is among reactors.

public_api.name: subscribeReactions
public_api.description: Registers a listener for the given thread namespace. Returns an unsubscribe function. Listeners are called after every write (applyOptimistic, rollbackOptimistic, applyInboundRumor). Thread key is used to scope listeners so cross-thread noise is suppressed.

public_api.name: ReactionAggregate
public_api.signature: export interface ReactionAggregate { emoji: string; count: number; reactors: string[]; selfReacted: boolean; }
public_api.description: Seam S2 output type. Reactors is in oldest-first order. selfReacted is true iff selfPubkey has a non-removed row for (messageId, emoji).

private_files: app/src/lib/reactions/api.ts (idbKeyFor helper, write queues, in-memory map, listener registry — all module-private)
owned_data: In-memory Map<string, Reaction[]> keyed by idb namespace string (thread key)
dependencies_forbidden: react (no React import in lib/ — useSyncExternalStore pattern is exposed through subscriber callbacks, not React hooks in this module)
Any new npm package not already in package.json
external_ports: idb-keyval get/set — read/write reaction arrays per thread namespace
events_emitted: Subscriber listener() calls — fired after every idb write, scoped to the affected thread
events_consumed: Inbound kind-7 rumors via applyInboundRumor (called by MarmotContext case 7: and ContactChat gift-wrap path)

seam_compliance.S1: Consumes Reaction and ReactionThreadKey from app/src/lib/reactions/types.ts (story-01 output, frozen)
seam_compliance.S2: Produces loadReactions, aggregateForMessage, subscribeReactions, applyInboundRumor, applyOptimistic, rollbackOptimistic — exact signatures match architecture.md Seam S2
seam_compliance.S4: applyInboundRumor is the single convergence point for both DM and group inbound paths; returns { messageId } or null per S4 invariants

idb_key_derivation.note: Inline idbKeyFor() pure function; no separate idbKeys.ts file needed

write_queue_design: Per-thread Promise chain (same pattern as chatPersistence.ts appendQueues). Each namespace key maps to a pending Promise. Concurrent writes are serialized by chaining onto the previous promise.
